name: restaurant365-odata-pp-mcp
description: Read-only Restaurant365 OData CLI for schema discovery, safe sampling, backfill planning, export, sync, and deleted-record checks.

restaurant365_odata_password.title: RESTAURANT365_ODATA_PASSWORD
restaurant365_odata_password.description: Sets RESTAURANT365_ODATA_PASSWORD for the Restaurant365 OData Connector MCP server.

restaurant365_odata_username.title: RESTAURANT365_ODATA_USERNAME
restaurant365_odata_username.description: Sets RESTAURANT365_ODATA_USERNAME for the Restaurant365 OData Connector MCP server.
